chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4944 - وَ رَوَى أَحْمَدُ بْنُ اَلنَّضْرِ عَنْ عَبَّادٍ عَنْ كَثِيرٍ اَلنَّوَّاءِ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلْكَبَائِرِ فَقَالَ "كُلُّ مَا أَوْعَدَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَيْهِ اَلنَّارَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4944 - Ahmad ibn al-Nadr narrated from Abbad, from Kathir al-Nawwa', who said:
I asked Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) about the major sins.
He said: "Every sin for which Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, has promised the Hellfire is a major sin."
